title: Verify Full Cancellation Flow with Incentive Conversion
description: Tests the entire cancellation funnel where the user rejects the reminder, proceeds to cancel, and accepts the discount offer.
preconditions: User has an active trial with more than 24 hours remaining.
The 'First Month Discount' offer is enabled in the backend.

steps.description: 3. In the 'Loss Aversion' pop-up, click the secondary action 'Cancel Anyway & Lose Access'.
4. Observe the 'First Month Discount' offer pop-up.
5. Click the primary action to accept the offer (e.g., 'Grab Offer').

expected_result: User is taken to a payment page to secure the discount. The user's trial remains active, and their first month mandate is updated to the discounted price. The 'cancel-clicked' event is fired from the discount pop-up.
